query_string: ("Medical Director" OR "Lead Physician" OR "Behavioral Health Champion" OR "Clinical Director" OR "Chief of Medicine" OR "Supervising Physician") AND ("primary care" OR "family practice" OR "family medicine" OR "PCP") site:linkedin.com/in
why_this_slot: Second priority — primary theme Clinical Outcomes, secondary Workflow / Ops

results.title: Patrick Carroll - Chief Medical Officer at HIMS-HERS
results.snippet: May 5, 2020 - 📊Initial clinical tracks are pragmatic and “volume ready”: early CKM (HTN/lipids/weight/A1c), CKM (diabetes/CKD/ASCVD), MSK chronic pain, and behavioral health (depression/anxiety). 📅 Timeline: model runs 10 years starting July 1, 2026; applications opening January 1, 2026. 🩺 Integration with primary care is baked in: co-management payment for coordination (with no copay!), required electronic updates to PCPs/referrals and HIE connectivity.

results.title: Barak Gaster - Professor of Medicine, Director Cognition in Primary Care | LinkedIn
results.snippet: August 1, 2025 - I'm the Director of the Cognition in Primary Care Program, a professor of medicine at the University of Washington, a practicing primary care physician, and a dementia expert with more than 20 years experience in clinical care and medical education. Cognition in Primary Care provides comprehensive training and tools to help PCPs detect, diagnose, and manage mild cognitive impairment and dementia in the primary care setting.

results.title: Stephen Nord MD - PremierCOMP Medical Group | LinkedIn
results.snippet: The Family Medicine Residency Program’s “clinic-first” model gives trainees experience in various care environments, making it possible to have years-long therapeutic relationships with their patients. The program is also committed to training Family Medicine physicians to be trailblazers while advancing the mission of transforming primary care and wellness for all.

results.snippet: Using this model, they have managed to provide primary care to >6000 people in the country who otherwise would have NO access. In our latest episode of Primary Focus, I take you with me to Renfrew County where we meet patients, physicians and other health professionals who are part of this model.

results.snippet: December 4, 2025 - In clinical practice, small clarifications often lead to meaningful change.
